content.en:
Not far away.

His Royal Highness Qin Chen's figure appeared, and it was not far from Ye Tian's location.

After these highnesses and the inheritance Dao sons entered the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, they immediately separated and searched for the Heavenly Dao script.

Ye Tian also immediately set off and began to look for the Heavenly Dao text.

However, looking for the Heavenly Dao text is also a matter of luck, and Ye Tian has no way of knowing which location has the Heavenly Dao text.

Moreover, among the Heavenly Dao texts, what he wanted most was the Space and Time Heavenly Dao Texts, and as for the other Heavenly Dao Texts, he really didn't have much desire.

But how rare the Time Heavenly Dao Script and the Space Heavenly Dao Script are, the possibility of encountering them is too low.

......

Ye Tian flew aimlessly, his luck was not bad, and he finally found a Heavenly Dao text a few days later.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian looked at the Heavenly Killing Dao text floating in the void in the distance, revealing a little interest.

The Heavenly Dao Text of Killing represents the power of killing, and for those who walk the way of killing, the value of this Heavenly Dao Text is immeasurable.

And the Killing Great Divine Power also needs the Heavenly Dao Killing Script, otherwise it will not be able to practice the Killing Great Divine Power at all.

The power of the Heavenly Dao Killing Text formed a huge domain, and in this realm, a figure was standing.

The figure couldn't see its face clearly, but it was full of killing power.

"Heavenly Dao Guardian!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Heavenly Dao Guardian guards the Heavenly Dao Text, if it does not step into the realm of the Heavenly Dao Text, the Heavenly Dao Guardian will not attack, but if it enters the realm of the Heavenly Dao Text, the Heavenly Dao Guardian will attack.

In the realm of the Heavenly Dao Text of Killing, the energy such as divine power and immortal power was suppressed, and other supernatural powers and secret techniques could not be used one by one, and even the power of chaos would be suppressed.

In addition, Ye Tian's Heavenly Dao Peerless Heavenly Moon Knife would also be suppressed to a very weak level, unless his Heavenly Moon Knife was dedicated to the way of killing.

But in fact, Ye Tian's Tianyue Knife is not a way to kill, although it also contains killing, killing is not the main factor.

Therefore, it was impossible for Ye Tian to exert the power of the Tianyue Knife.

"I don't know how to kill supernatural powers, and my immortal power is not as good as the true god-level and god-level highnesses of the human race, but my advantage is physical strength. This is simply incomparable to other highnesses and sons of inheritance, so the strength I exert in the Heavenly Dao Writing Realm is even stronger than those great god-level highnesses. "

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

The other highnesses and the inheritance of the Dao Son came to this realm where the Heavenly Dao Text of Killing was turned into a realm, and they might not be able to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian, but Ye Tian's hope was even greater.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian stepped into this realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian of the Heavenly Dao Text of Killing woke up, and a pair of pupils in the darkness stared at Ye Tian, and an extremely rich murderous aura descended.

I saw this Heavenly Dao Guardian holding a killing sword and killing in the air.

Swish!!!!

The terrifying killing sword qi slashed in, as if it was about to kill Ye Tian with a sword.

Then.

Ye Tian urged the power of his whole body, and cast the Mixed Yuan Scale Armor, although most of it was suppressed, it could still exert a certain effect.

Sky Moon Knife!

Ye Tian slashed over with a sword, and the invisible sword qi faced the tangible killing sword qi.

Boom!!!

The collision began!

Knock knock knock!!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian retreated some distance, while Ye Tian also retreated some distance.

Bang bang bang!!!

Ye Tian and the Heavenly Dao Guardian kept fighting, and the sword light and sword light spread throughout the entire realm.

"No, this Heavenly Dao Guardian is too powerful, and it is supported by the power of Heavenly Dao words, it will never be exhausted, and it can even remain at its peak all the time!"

Ye Tian frowned and pondered, if he continued to fight like this, he would definitely be the one who lost in the end.

So, he had to figure out a way.

"By the way, the power of the Heavenly Dao Guardian comes from the Heavenly Dao Text, if the Heavenly Dao Guardian is separated from the Heavenly Dao Text, and the Heavenly Dao Guardian is isolated from this realm, then the Heavenly Dao Guardian should be able to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardian!"

If it was someone else, there might be no way to isolate the Heavenly Dao Guardian, but Ye Tian really had a way.

"Space Statue!"

Ye Tian had a thought in his heart and used this spatial supernatural power.

Although the power of space has also been suppressed, the power of the space idol is not very strong, but it can still be used.

If you can show it, that's enough!

"Void Palm!"

Ye Tian's hand slammed into the Heavenly Dao Guardian, and at the cost of his injury, he descended on the top of the Heavenly Dao Guardian's head.

Then, Ye Tian tried his best to urge the Void Mi Palm to attract the Heavenly Dao Guardian, and it was bound to suck it into the Void Mina Realm.

Thundered!!!!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian desperately attacked Ye Tian, and Ye Tian desperately sucked the Heavenly Dao Guardian into the Void Palm.

Puff puff puff!!

Cracks appeared on Ye Tian's palm, which were the scars cut by the Heavenly Dao Guardian, but Ye Tian still insisted.

Ultimately.

Boom!

The Heavenly Dao Guardian was brought into the Void Mina Realm and suppressed by Ye Tian layer by layer.

At this time, most of the Heavenly Dao Guardian's connection with the Heavenly Dao text was cut off, but there was still a small part of it that was connected to the Heavenly Dao text.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian flew quickly, and in the blink of an eye, he flew out of the realm of the Heavenly Dao Text of Killing.

When Ye Tian completely left the realm, the connection between the Heavenly Dao Guardian and the Heavenly Dao text had almost weakened.

Without the blessing of the Heavenly Dao Text, the Heavenly Dao Guardian is equivalent to a rootless duckweed.

After a while, the Heavenly Dao Guardian was wiped out by Ye Tian again and again, turned into ashes, and dissipated into this Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

Immediately, Ye Tian entered the realm of the Killing Heavenly Dao Text, entered the core, and grabbed the Killing Heavenly Dao Text.

"Close!"

The Heavenly Killing Dao text was integrated into Ye Tian's soul little by little, and finally opened up a small soul space within Ye Tian's soul.

After getting this Heavenly Dao Text of Killing, Ye Tian was in a good mood, at least he wouldn't get nothing.

In the following days, Ye Tian wandered everywhere and discovered several Heavenly Dao characters one after another.

In the blink of an eye, half a year has passed.

-------------

"It's been half a year, and although I've collected the Heavenly Dao Text of Killing, the Heavenly Dao Text of Fire, the Heavenly Dao Text of Wood, the Heavenly Dao Text of Water, the Heavenly Dao Text of Life, and the Heavenly Dao Text of Illusion, it's a pity that I still haven't found any traces of the Heavenly Dao Text of Time and the Heavenly Dao Text of Emptiness!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh secretly.

Six Heavenly Dao characters, such a harvest is already very huge, but Ye Tian is not satisfied at all.

He didn't want these six Heavenly Dao Texts, no matter how many Heavenly Dao Texts there were, it wouldn't be of great help to him.

"I can't go on like this, if I continue to look in this area, even if I find a few more ordinary Heavenly Dao characters, then this time the great opportunity will be average for me. Ye Tian thought to himself.

After pondering for a while, he decided to go deep into the depths of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

Although the Kunwu Supreme had said that it was almost impossible to go deep into the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, what if there was hope, it was better than wasting time here!

As a result, Ye Tian began to fly continuously towards the depths of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, flying at the fastest speed at present.

Time passed slowly like this, Ye Tian kept flying and flying, completely unaware of where he was going to fly and where was his destination?

A certain day.

A ghostly light flashed, and the speed was so fast that Ye Tian even thought it was an illusion.

"That was ...... just now"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

"It's a creature!" Ye Tian felt that his feelings were not wrong, although he didn't have time to check it with his copying talent, but there was absolutely nothing wrong.

"Chase!"

Ye Tian quickly flew in the direction where the ghost light disappeared, and kept turning on the copying talent, so as not to miss another opportunity.

After chasing for about a few hours, just as Ye Tian was about to give up, the ghost light reappeared.

This time, although Ye Tian didn't catch up, he used the copying talent to check the opponent's talent in time, and successfully copied all of them.

Species: Xukun

Bloodline Talent: Universe level

Strength Talents: Arcanon

Speed Talent: Arcanon

Defense Talent: Arcane

Space Talent: God-level

Information Sharing: God-level

......

"Xukun!"

Ye Tian saw this kind of creature for the first time, and the other party actually had a god-level space talent, you must know that in the universe, how rare a creature with a god-level space talent is!

And the speed of this Xukun is very fast, as if it is flying like a game, but the speed is almost beyond Ye Tian's perception.

In the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, the strong will also be suppressed very strongly, which shows that the strength of this Void Kun must be very strong, although it is not necessarily a cosmic god, but it is definitely a realm above the great god level.

"It is said that there is a higher level of spatial talent above the god-level spatial talent, but it is a pity that the god-level spatial talent cannot be fused. A talent for sharing information, is that a talent?"

Ye Tian was curious.

So, he began to incorporate a talent for information sharing.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully integrate the talent of information sharing.

Originally, Ye Tian didn't care much about the talent for information sharing, but after the fusion, he was shocked.

"It turned out to be a god-level talent that could communicate with other Xukun regardless of distance!" Ye Tian was stunned.

When Ye Tian opened the talent of information sharing, he quickly received a set of messages.

"It's so boring here, do you have any companions nearby?"

This set of information must have come from the other end of the void, and it is very likely that it is the one who left just now.

Receiving this set of information, Ye Tian suddenly had an idea.

"If I disguise myself as a vain, will there be a windfall?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
